material_claim_rule: Do not publish specific material claims until supplier documentation is confirmed and owner approved.

products.title: Custom Name Necklace
products.seo_title: Custom Name Necklace | Personalized Jewelry Gifts | North & Pearl
products.meta_description: Create a custom name necklace made for meaningful gifting. A personalized keepsake for birthdays, anniversaries, mothers, bridesmaids, and everyday moments.
products.short_description: A personalized name necklace made to carry the word, name, or memory that matters most.
products.long_description: Designed as a thoughtful everyday keepsake, the Custom Name Necklace turns a meaningful name into a wearable gift. Use it for birthdays, anniversaries, bridal party gifts, Mother's Day, or a just-because moment.
products.gift_positioning: Best for birthdays, anniversaries, bridesmaids, mothers, and meaningful self-gifting.
products.care_instructions: Store separately, keep away from harsh chemicals, and clean gently with a soft dry cloth.

faq.question: Can I choose any name?
faq.answer: Character limits will be confirmed before launch and shown on the product page.

faq.question: Are materials confirmed?
faq.answer: No. Material claims must be confirmed before publishing.

products.long_description: The Personalized Bar Necklace is a modern keepsake designed for engraved meaning. It works well for anniversaries, couples, mothers, bridesmaids, and everyday reminders.
